title: build_request returns (call_id, req) tuple to make request/response pairing compiler-visible
description: build_request returns (&'static str, JmapRequest) instead of just a JmapRequest. The call_id is threaded from build_request through to extract_response at the call site, making the pairing explicit and compiler-checked. The naive alternative is a shared CALL_ID constant that callers reference independently; if a method ever needed a different call ID, or if two requests were issued in the same method, the shared constant would silently produce the wrong pairing. Returning the tuple keeps the coupling local and visible without adding any real complexity.
